# OpenBox Docs: LLM-Friendly Index
#
# This file is intended for agents and scrapers that prefer a plain-text sitemap
# with human-readable labels.
#
# Base URL: https://docs.openbox.ai
# Docs base: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/

## Getting Started
- OpenBox: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/
- Getting Started: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/getting-started
- Registering Agents: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/getting-started/registering-agents
- Quick Start: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/getting-started/quick-start
- Troubleshooting: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/getting-started/troubleshooting

## Core Concepts
- Trust Scores: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/core-concepts/trust-scores
- Trust Tiers: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/core-concepts/trust-tiers
- Governance Decisions: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/core-concepts/governance-decisions

## Trust Lifecycle
- Trust Lifecycle: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/trust-lifecycle
- Overview: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/trust-lifecycle/overview
- Assess: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/trust-lifecycle/assess
- Authorize: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/trust-lifecycle/authorize
- Monitor: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/trust-lifecycle/monitor
- Verify: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/trust-lifecycle/verify
- Session Replay: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/trust-lifecycle/session-replay
- Adapt: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/trust-lifecycle/adapt

## Developer Guide
- SDK Reference: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/developer-guide/sdk-reference
- Temporal Integration Guide (Python): https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/developer-guide/temporal-integration-guide-python
- Configuration: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/developer-guide/configuration
- Error Handling: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/developer-guide/error-handling
- Event Types: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/developer-guide/event-types

## Dashboard
- Dashboard: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/dashboard
- Agents: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/dashboard/agents
- Trust Overview: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/dashboard/trust-overview
- Alerts: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/dashboard/alerts

## Approvals
- Approvals: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/approvals

## Administration
- Organization: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/administration/organization

## Reference
- Glossary: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/glossary
